tasks.subject: Task 0: Core geometry value objects
tasks.description:
Window/Tile/HaloExtent (core/geometry.py) + PointSet (core/grid.py), frozen, math-free.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/core/geometry.py", "src/sverdrup/core/grid.py", "tests/test_geometry.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_geometry.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Window/Tile/HaloExtent frozen and math-free", "HaloExtent carries radius_km not degree pads", "PointSet holds (k,3) points + crs", "Tile.grid is GridSpec; core/extended are Window"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Blend enum + provenance extensions
tasks.description:
CovFidelity.BLENDED; TransformKind.BLEND; KnownBias.{CONSERVATIVE_HALO_RESIDUAL,STRUCTURED_BASIS_ORIENTATION}; blend_transform().

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/core/types.py", "src/sverdrup/core/provenance.py", "tests/test_blend_provenance.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_blend_provenance.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CovFidelity.BLENDED distinct", "TransformKind.BLEND + two distinct KnownBias kinds", "blend_transform records conservative halo bias + k + distinct structured marker"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Partition-of-unity weights (smootherstep)
tasks.description:
partition_weights(tiles, points): Sw=1, quintic smootherstep, C1 across boundaries.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py", "tests/test_blend_weights.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_blend_weights.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["partition_weights columns sum to 1", "quintic smootherstep taper, core authoritative", "weight first derivative continuous across boundaries"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Blend cheap path (moment crossfade)
tasks.description:
BlendInput/BlendOperator/BlendedDistribution; mean crossfade + (Sigma w sigma)^2 variance; no-dip; conservative; BLENDED fidelity + BlendTransform.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py", "tests/test_blend_cheap_path.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_blend_cheap_path.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["blended mean = weight crossfade at shared nodes", "no mid-overlap variance dip (corr=1 formula)", "blended sigma >= max constituent sigma", "provenance carries BlendTransform + BLENDED fidelity"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Coherent sampler (z_r seam + global diagonal noise)
tasks.description:
CoherentSampler; StructuredNoiseSource seam; MemberSeededZr (member-only); diagonal_noise per global cell x member; realize_one = mean + B z_r + sqrt(d) z_diag.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py", "tests/test_coherent_sampler.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_coherent_sampler.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MemberSeededZr is tile-independent", "diagonal_noise coherent per global cell x member", "realize_one = mean + B z_r + sqrt(d) z_diag"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Blend general path (coherent-sample crossfade)
tasks.description:
BlendedDistribution.sample()/covariance() via Sigma w_i X_i^m; NoiseSpec stored; samples seam-continuous.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py", "tests/test_blend_general_path.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_blend_general_path.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["blend stores NoiseSpec", "sample returns (m,ny,nx) coherent crossfade", "samples continuous across seam (no spike)", "covariance returns crossfaded sample covariance"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: FirstDifference composes on BlendedDistribution
tasks.description:
Composition pre-check: FirstDifference.apply(blended) yields finite mean+variance, no NotImplementedError.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_blend_derived_composition.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_blend_derived_composition.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FirstDifference.apply(blended) yields finite mean+variance", "no NotImplementedError on covariance reads"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Cheap-vs-sample variance agreement (diagnostic gate)
tasks.description:
Analytic vs sampled marginal variance agree in overlap within MC tolerance; divergence escalates per spec section 8.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_blend_cheap_vs_sample.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_blend_cheap_vs_sample.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cheap vs sampled variance agree in overlap (median rel <= 0.15 at m=512)", "divergence escalated per spec section 8, not loosened"], "failurePolicy": "stop-and-escalate", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Cross-seam derivative gate (structured-coherence)
tasks.description:
Cross-seam firstdifference variance not inflated vs single-tile reference; failure -> swap structured driver + owner escalation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_cross_seam_derivative_gate.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_cross_seam_derivative_gate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cross-seam derivative variance not inflated (seam <= 2x interior)", "failure routes to structured-driver swap + owner escalation, not tolerance loosening"], "failurePolicy": "stop-and-escalate", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Eval-point PersistedPoints + blend over PointSet
tasks.description:
Shared-basis eval rows on-worker (never re-factor); PersistedPoints; blend over PointSet crossfades withheld points in overlaps.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/core/product.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/persisted.py", "src/sverdrup/application/solve.py", "tests/test_eval_point_blend.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_eval_point_blend.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EvalPointPredictions carries shared-basis factor+residual (back-compat defaults)", "Cov(eval,grid)=B_eval B_grid^T shared basis, not re-factored", "blend over PointSet crossfades eval points", "overlap withheld point mixes both tiles"], "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: LatitudeVaryingProvider
tasks.description:
ParameterProvider resolving correlation_length as equator->pole field; constants pass through; stable key.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/core/parameters.py", "tests/test_latitude_varying_provider.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_latitude_varying_provider.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["correlation_length field decreases equator->pole", "constants pass through as scalars", "params_key stable + encodes profile"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: ScaleAwareHalo + LonLatPartition
tasks.description:
km halos via correlation provider; lon/lat partition; tile grids are target.window sub-grids (co-registered overlap nodes).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tiling.py", "tests/test_tiling_partition.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_tiling_partition.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["halo_km = max(k*corr_len, stencil), widest at equator", "extended contains core; cores tile target; overlaps non-empty", "tile grids are windows of target (co-registered nodes)"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: TilingCoordinator + run_tiled_pipeline
tasks.description:
One UnitOfWork per tile via existing Executor; gather Persisted reps; blend over grid (+ eval PointSet); run_tiled_pipeline reuses Phase-1 prepare/evaluate.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tiling.py", "src/sverdrup/application/pipeline.py", "tests/test_tiling_coordinator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_tiling_coordinator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["one submit per tile, no re-granularization", "gather -> blend over target per output time", "blended mean matches cheap-path crossfade", "run_tiled_pipeline reuses Phase-1 prepare/evaluate, no new ports"], "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Pluggable WithholdingStrategy + 2 exemplars
tasks.description:
WithholdingStrategy protocol; LeaveOneMissionOut; PerMissionTemporalFraction with disjoint buffer-discard; random_point rejected; Split.buffer_discard_idx.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/withholding.py", "src/sverdrup/application/splits.py", "tests/test_withholding.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_withholding.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WithholdingStrategy protocol with 4-way assignment", "LeaveOneMissionOut withholds whole mission", "PerMissionTemporalFraction has disjoint buffer-discard", "random_point still rejected; Split.buffer_discard_idx back-compat"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Area-weighted global aggregation
tasks.description:
area_weighted_mean/rmse using GridSpec.cell_area(); weighted != unweighted under cos(lat).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/eval/aggregate.py", "tests/test_aggregate.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_aggregate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["area_weighted_mean uses cell_area, matches hand value", "weighted differs from unweighted under cos(lat)", "area_weighted_rmse correct"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Stage-A integration gate (CHECKPOINT)
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Regional multi-tile blend through LocalCluster matches single-tile reference, no seam, conservative sigma, withheld eval OSSE+OSE, provenance, both exemplars, random holdout rejected, Task7+Task8 gates pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_phase2_stage_a.py", "src/sverdrup/application/pipeline.py", "src/sverdrup/application/tiling.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_phase2_stage_a.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["multi-tile blended mean matches single-tile reference rel L2 <= 0.05 with no seam in mean or sigma", "blended sigma >= single-tile reference sigma everywhere", "coherent samples seam-free, no mid-overlap variance dip on integrated product", "withheld-point eval in overlaps fires OSSE (vs truth) and OSE (vs withheld c2) with finite accuracy+calibration scores", "provenance carries BlendTransform with CONSERVATIVE_HALO_RESIDUAL and BLENDED fidelity", "both withholding exemplars run and random_point holdout raises", "Task 7 + Task 8 gates pass on the integrated regional product"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "stage-a", "failurePolicy": "stop-and-escalate", "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: Stage B — global, projection-mixed (OPT-IN)
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Stage B only after Stage A passes. ProjectionMixedPartition; Persisted.regrid (samples/cov, never variance-map); cross-CRS blend; polar-void relaxes to prior; opt-in area-weighted global 2023a OSE run (SVERDRUP_GLOBAL_DATA=1).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tiling.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/persisted.py", "src/sverdrup/distributions/blend.py", "tests/test_phase2_stage_b.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -- tests/test_phase2_stage_b.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ProjectionMixedPartition yields polar-stereographic caps + lon/lat mid-lat tiles, no single-projection assumption", "PersistedDistribution.regrid via samples/cov preserves mean on round-trip, never interpolates the variance map", "BlendOperator blends constituents with differing CRS by regridding onto union support", "polar-void test: blended sigma relaxes to >= 0.9 x prior sigma in a real data void", "opt-in global 2023a OSE run computes area-weighted global metrics, skipped cleanly without data"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "stage-b", "failurePolicy": "stop-and-escalate", "modelTier": "complex"}
```
